Ensure food is piping hot before serving. Tray not suitable for oven heating. Microwave from chilled 800W 900W stand 4 mins 3½ mins 1 min Microwave Remove sleeve and pierce film lid. Place directly into microwave. Halfway through heating, peel back film lid, stir & re-cover. After heating allow to stand for 1 minute and stir before serving.
